evidence_hint: 7 `as unknown as` double-casts: inventory.ts:340 `return fields as unknown as NormalizedMeta`, inventory.ts:374,269,276, pipeline.ts:66,73, verify.ts:72. Each launders an arbitrary Record into NormalizedMeta with no runtime validation.
residual_if_not_resolved: Replace double-casts with a validated narrowing (runtime shape guard) at the meta-bag boundary, or a single typed adapter with unit tests.
